title: Add MruKnowne9 to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [MruKnowne9](https://mruknowne9.pages.dev) to build
- Provide the app description for MruKnowne9.

Fixes #9987

gist.headline: New sprout in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: The community garden grows again. MruKnowne9 has officially taken root in the Pollinations app showcase.
gist.summary: Added the community-built app MruKnowne9 to the Pollinations greenhouse and app directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore MruKnowne9 alongside other community creations in the official showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse, tending to a new digital plant that represents the newly added community app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing new digital seedling inside a warm glass greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
